title: POST /ask — Request Body
description: The request payload for the SugarCRM Analytics Agent endpoint. The SugarCRM OAuth 2.0 bearer token is provided via the Authorization header, not in the body.

examples: Show me opportunities with no interaction the last 2 weeks
Break down my Q3 pipeline by stage conversion rates
Show me win rates by product category
Who has the shortest average sales cycle in my team?
What's changed in the pipeline this past week?
List all open deals assigned to me this quarter

sessionId.description: Optional session identifier to support follow-up scope refinements. Omit for stateless single-question requests.

examples.question: Show me opportunities with no interaction the last 2 weeks
Now show me the same for the last 30 days
